text: Hey guys, it's Dr. Amadio Leyva. I have a video regarding a gallbladder I did recently. It appeared to be fairly simple, kind of the last case of the day. It seemed to be gallbladder day, no issues or problems with the other ones.

I left it fairly unedited. I sped it up two times and I hope you enjoy. And as you go through the video, think of what you would have done and leave some comments on some of those management type of decisions. Thank you.

I would say that here I'm not necessarily worried about the bleeding. However, I'm more concerned about getting bleeding that I can't control or will impede my ability to visualize that abnormal structure and then injure something that maybe if I'd have just brought something else out like the vestibular could have helped me.
